weapons.name: Balistus grenade launcher
weapons.abilities: Explosive, only for models in Terminator armor

weapons.name: Digital weapons
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, hits automatically wound the target.

weapons.name: Models wearing Terminator armor can only receive equipment with .

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.description: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game.

equipment.name: Augury uplink
equipment.description: The model and its attached may re-roll a single failed save per battle round.

equipment.name: Blade Imperator
equipment.description: The model and its attached unit gain "Frenzy(2")". Unique.

equipment.name: Castellan's mark
equipment.description: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, remove and redeploy up to two of your units. Unique.

equipment.name: Gift of Terran Artifice
equipment.description: The model gains "Decimate" for all weapons. Unique.

equipment.name: Impregnable mind
equipment.description: This model can deny one psychic power per turn as if it were a Psyker.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 2+ armor save.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.description: The model can reroll one hit roll with this weapon per round. Must be purchased separately for each weapon.

equipment.name: Panoptispex
equipment.description: The model and its attached unit gain "Seeking" for all ranged weapons. Unique.

equipment.name: Praesidius
equipment.description: The model gains the "Stealth" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Praetorian plate
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Purity seal
equipment.description: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Radiant mantle
equipment.description: Enemy units suffer a cumulative -1 to their hit rolls against the model.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.description: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Superior Creation
equipment.description:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.description: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.description: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Vault weapon
equipment.description:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Each improvement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Models wearing Terminator armor can only receive equipment with .

veteran_abilities.name: Favoured enemy
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

veteran_abilities.name: Furious charge
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

veteran_abilities.name: Tank hunter
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

veteran_abilities.name: Terrain expert
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

veteran_abilities.name: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT
veteran_abilities.description: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT

veteran_abilities.name: Additional armor
veteran_abilities.description: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

veteran_abilities.name: Hunter-killer missile
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

veteran_abilities.name: Improved targeting
veteran_abilities.description: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

veteran_abilities.name: Jammer
veteran_abilities.description: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

veteran_abilities.name: Magos-class machine spirit
veteran_abilities.description: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 2+.

veteran_abilities.name: Smoke Launcher
veteran_abilities.description:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.
